content_sections.heading: Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Overview
Panjab University Guest Faculty Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Panjab University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Panjab University Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 28 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Guest Faculty (Commerce) post in Panjab University Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria for the Guest Faculty position are as per Panjab University/UGC norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculty post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Panjab University, Sikhwala, Punjab.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificate if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an age limit. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any age-related information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply online for this post?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is through a walk-in interview, and no online application is required.
